ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user on the platform */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "phone" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user's account has been verified */,
  "security_question" TEXT /* Security question for account recovery */,
  "security_answer" TEXT /* Answer to the security question */,
  "total_tips" INTEGER /* Total number of tips placed by the user */,
  "pending_tips" INTEGER /* Number of tips currently pending */,
  "profit" REAL /* Total profit made by the user from bets */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bets" (
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user placing the bet */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event on which the bet is placed */,
  "bet_type" TEXT /* Type of bet (e.g., single, accumulator) */,
  "bet_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the bet (e.g., win, lose, pending) */,
  "stake" REAL /* Total stakes placed by the user (minimum 500000) */,
  "yield_percentage" REAL /* Yield percentage of the bet */,
  "expected_prize" TEXT /* Expected prize from the bet */,
  "bet_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the bet was placed */,
  "odds" REAL /* Odds of the bet */,
  "payoff" REAL /* Actual payoff amount if the bet wins */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bet associated with this history record */,
  "date_placed" TEXT /* Date when the bet was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bet (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "event_details" TEXT /* Details about the event (e.g., match, race) */,
  "bet_amount" REAL /* Amount of the bet */,
  "payout" REAL /* Payout amount if the bet wins */,
  "referrer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who referred this user (if applicable) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user placing the bet */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to place the bet (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_history_bet_id FOREIGN KEY ("bet_id") REFERENCES bets ("bet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_history_referrer_id FOREIGN KEY ("referrer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
